title: Enterprise-managed auth for MCP connectors
summary: Anthropic introduced enterprise-managed authentication for MCP connectors, allowing administrators to authorize and authenticate connectors organization-wide through identity providers without requiring individual employee setup. This streamlines secure integration and access management for enterprise deployments.
writeup: The video covers Anthropic's enterprise-managed authentication for MCP connectors, a feature that lets administrators authorize and authenticate connectors across an organization through identity providers. It matters because it removes the need for individual employee setup, centralizing access management for enterprise deployments. The key takeaways: connectors can be provisioned organization-wide, authentication runs through existing identity providers, and the result is more streamlined and secure integration.
